mapper.select: SELECT r.REVIEW_ID as reviewId, r.USER_ID as userId, r.QUEST_ID as questId, r.RATING as rating, r.CONTENT as content, r.CREATED_AT as createdAt, NVL(u.NICKNAME, u.NAME) as authorName FROM LQ_QUEST_REVIEW r INNER JOIN LQ_USER u ON r.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE r.QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT DESC, r.REVIEW_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_QUEST_REVIEW ( review_id, user_id, quest_id, rating, content, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_QUEST_REVIEW_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{questId}, #{rating}, #{content}, sysdate )
